name: Rice Salad with Wasabi Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked white or brown rice
recipeInstructions: Wasabi powder can be found in Oriental food markets. For the dressing, mix wasabi powder with 1 teaspoon warm water and let stand for 10 minutes. Combine all dressing ingredients and whisk until smooth. For the salad, thinly slice green onions on the diagonal. Core, seed, and dice red pepper. Cut the cucumber into halves lengthwise and scoop out seeds. Cut the cucumber crosswise into crescent-shaped slices. Add vegetables and rice to the dressing and toss well.
